info.title: InternoCore Inventory-Service
info.description: Microservicio Core para Inventario y Kardex

post.description: Batch endpoint to create multiple inventory transactions under a single folio/document.

get.description: List all current stock levels for the active company.
Generates a preview of the next folio for a given concept.

Recupera los detalles de un documento de inventario por su ID.
En el backend, el document_id es el id/trace_id de los movimientos.
Consulta los niveles de stock (Actual y Reservado) para un producto en un almacÃ©n.

schema.title: Response Get Stock Levels Api V1 Inventory Levels  Product Id   Warehouse Id  Get
Response Search Variants Api V1 Search Variants Get
Response Search Inventory Products Api V1 Search Products Search Get

post.description:
On-Demand Reconciliation: Manually triggers the backflushing logic for a specific error.
Used by warehouse managers after replenishing stock or fixings BOMs.

get.description: Returns aggregated counts for the top dashboard cards.

Returns a paginated & filtered list of inventory documents.
Supports optional date range: date_from / date_to (ISO 8601).

Returns the consolidated view of physical and transit stock.
Accessible by all valid tenant users.

post.description:
[EMERGENCY] Releases stuck reserved_quantity.
Requires OWNER/ADMIN role.

get.description:
Kardex: Running balance for a specific SKU/Warehouse.
Uses SQL Window Function SUM OVER (ORDER BY created_at).

WAC Valuation: Weighted Average Cost snapshot from the immutable Movement ledger.
as_of_date: optional ISO 8601 cutoff for historical valuation.

ABC Rotation: Classifies every SKU by 30-day exit velocity.
- A: rotation_index >= 0.7  (fast-movers)
- B: 0.3 <= index < 0.7
- C: index < 0.3            (slow-movers / dead stock)

Integra telemetrÃ­a de SQL y metadatos de Master Data.

Check if the company is ready for inventory operations.
Used during onboarding to guide the user.
